pageContext.name: Iron Man
pageContext.description: The Truth is… He is Iron Man  Our newest Qrew member is none other than Marvel Universe's Tony Stark, clad in his classic Iron Man suit. Engineered to give Stark superhuman power and a variety of weapons at his disposal, this iconic exoskeleton has become a beloved character in its own right.  Featuring a ubiquitous power button symbolic of the arc reactor in front with two nonfunctional USB ports in the back next to a corded vinyl plug (which doubles as a stand), every detail makes this vinyl figure a true 360-degree experience.  Our humble homage to the not-so-humble Tony Stark comes in the form of a high-quality, hand-painted vinyl. This figure is being offered in a numbered limited edition of 2500 units and will come with a certificate of authenticity display plaque, an authentication stamp and premium packaging.  About Qrew:  Qrew Art Vinyl collections represent the unique artistic vision of QMx. Featuring original designs from our creative team, Qrew celebrates diverse cultures and styles while putting collecting back in collectibles. Always limited and forever intriguing, Qrew features high-quality, premium vinyl, embracing exciting new artistic themes from our team of global artists. This is QMx, unchained and unfettered. Welcome to Qrew
